The build also involved adding ARB front and rear air lockers, four-wheel disc brakes, a 4" suspension lift, a 40-gallon fuel cell, and steel bumpers.

It is finished in green over black vinyl upholstery and is powered by a 3.9-liter inline-six linked with a three-speed manual transmission and a dual-range transfer case.

listings.title: 1999 Honda Integra Type R

It is powered by a 1.8-liter B18C inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transaxle and a helical limited-slip differential.
